---
title: "Infectious Disease Schedule"
output: 
  html_document
---

| Week | Date   | Module      |    Topic                                         | Activity     | Readings                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | Slides    | Assignments | Misc.  |
|:----:|:------:|-------------|--------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------|-------------|--------|
| 01   | 03 Feb | Coronavirus | Introduction                                     |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      |        |             | Coronavirus                                      |              | [1918 flu pandemic](https://www.pnas.org/content/pnas/104/18/7582.full.pdf) |           | [nCoV investigation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZailOerqGnhEGSgXTDG8ZgoVazdb_DWJ/view?usp=sharing) |        |
| 02   | 10 Feb |             | Coronavirus: is it a pandemic?                   |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 03   | 17 Feb | Dynamics    | Simple epidemic models                           |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 04   | 24 Feb |             | Host heterogeneity; multi-host & multi-pathogens |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 28 Feb |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 05   | 02 Mar |             | Spatial dynamics; controlling spread             |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 06 Mar |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 06   | 09 Mar |             | Controlling spread; population genetics          |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 13 Mar |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 07   | 16 Mar | Evolution   | Antibiotic resistance; evolution of virulence    |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 20 Mar |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 23 Mar |             | **Break**                                        |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 08   | 30 Mar |             | Coevolution; cospeciation                        |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 30 Mar |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 09   | 06 Apr | Ecology     | Interactions between parasites within hosts      |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 10 Apr |             | **No class; Chris at a meeting**                 |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 10   | 13 Apr |             | Parasite and host diversity                      |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 13 Apr |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 11   | 20 Apr |             | Regulation of hosts by pathogens                 |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 24 Apr |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 12   | 27 Apr |             | Pathogens and communities                        |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
|      | 01 May |             |                                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| 13   | 04 May |             | Pathogens and ecosystems                         |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
| Exam | xx May |             |                                                  |              |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |           |             |        |
